## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.7

### Cameras
- Removes the camera binary Motion entity so camera motion is exposed through the Motion event entity instead of a stale on/off sensor.
- Keeps APK camera history records from forcing the binary motion state to detected.
- Adds an explicit camera icon so camera rows render correctly in Home Assistant device pages.

### Entities
- Cleans up old camera binary Motion entities from the Home Assistant entity registry.
- Keeps non-camera motion entities when devices report a real motion state.
- Adds explicit icons for remaining entity descriptions that previously depended on fallback icon handling.

### Events
- Keeps camera Motion event payloads focused on the event time so raw APK metadata is not shown in the entity row.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for camera motion event-only behavior.
- Adds regression coverage for old camera binary Motion entity cleanup.
- Adds regression coverage so entity descriptions keep either an icon or a Home Assistant device class.
